column7: Enhances spikelet count and panicle weight; split application recommended to prevent lodging.
Stimulates uniform root development and tillering; balanced start for high-yield potential.
Enhances N use efficiency through sulfur synergy; slower N release reduces leaching losses.
Increases stalk rigidity and standability; K improves water use efficiency in irrigated fields.
Vitamin B complex improves root metabolism; Cu and Zn enhance enzymatic activity supporting spikelet development and grain set.
Nano-phosphate improves P availability in flooded soils; microbial component enhances P solubilization near roots.
Promotes mycorrhizal associations; organic materials stimulate fungal networks that extend root nutrient scavenging range.
Green manure adds N, P, K and micronutrients upon decomposition; improves soil structure for robust hybrid root development.
Quick-response nutrient supply during reproductive stage; foliar application corrects deficiency symptoms within 48–72 hours.
